site.title: Kibuka kia ku Kuatekesa Akuetu a Bhindama
site.tagline: O athu a tena ku sumba o ima ia bhindamena, maji ka tena ku kala ni ima ioso ia bhindamena
nav.label: Milongi ia beta-o-kota
nav.languageNoMatch: Se-ku kima kilondekesa kuila muéne ua di te mu jinvunda
hero.home.eyebrow: A tena ku jikula o kijimbuete kiki, mu internete
hero.projects.eyebrow: Divulu dia ku bhaka o madivulu
hero.accessibility.eyebrow: O kuila o athu a tena ku di longa o Bibidia?
hero.transparency.eyebrow: Milongi ia Bibidia Phala o Athu Oso
meta.home.description: O IATF i bhangesa o athu ku jikula o jifalamenda ja komputadolo, phala ku sanga o milongi ia bhindamena.
meta.projects.description: Tanga o madivulu a bhange o kibuka kia kutokuesa o ima iala mu ngongo ioso (IATF).
meta.propose.description: Bhinga kikuatekesu ku kibuka kia IATF bhu kaxi ka Internete, e-mail, mba Discord.
meta.governance.description: Tanga kiebhi o kisangela kia IATF ki xikina o ikalakalu, ki langa o ima ia tokala ku sanga o athu, ki i sueka ué o ima ioso ia lungu ni ikalakalu.
meta.join.description: Kiebhi ki u tena ku kuatekesa o kibuka kia IATF: Kubhana milongi, kulungulula, kutetulula, mba kulanga o kikalakalu kiê.
meta.accessibility.description: Kiebhi o kibuka kia IATF kia tena ku kuatekesa o athu ku jikula o kijimbuete kiki, ni kiebhi ki u tena ku bhana o ngolokela ia lungu ni kijijidiku kiki?
meta.transparency.description: IATF Public Records: O ima ioso ia lungu ni ku sola, ni ikalakalu, ni ima ia ubhe iene mu bhanga o athu, ene mu i jikula.
actions.visitGithub: Jikula o kijimbuete kietu mu kijimbuete GitHub
actions.emailProjects: Soneka o ima i ua mesena mu kaxa ka kutambuijila
actions.joinDiscord: Kala ku Mbandu ia Kibuka kia Sidivisu
registry.empty.title: Ka soneka luua o jipondo ja beta-o-kota
registry.empty.body: O IATF ia mu pelepalala o milongi ia dianga phala o athu.
registry.col.maintainer: O muthu ua tokala ku mu langa
proposal.form.title: Bhinga kikuatekesu
proposal.form.body: Bhanga o kibhuidisu kiala ku luiji phala ku tumikisa o ngolokela ku kibuka kia IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: Ua tokala u soneka mu JavaScript phala ku katula mbote mu kijimbuete kiki.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: O kijimbuete kiki, kia-nda jikula o kijimbuete kia ku tumikisa o njimbu.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Ku pelepalala o ima phala ku bokona...
proposal.form.ready: Kioso ki ua-nda tumikisa o mukanda, o IATF ia-nda bhanga o kijimbuete kiki.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Tua ku dióndo, tala kiambote o kijimbuete kiki, ande dia ku tumikisa o njimbu.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Tua ku dióndo, tala dingi kiambote o kijimbuete kiki, ande dia ku tumikisa o njimbu.
proposal.form.turnstileError: O kijimbuete kiki, ki ki tena ku bhana itendelesu ia lungu ni muthu iú, mu kiki-phe sota ku sokejeka o kijimbuete.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: O kijimbuete ki ua-nda sanga-mu, ki kia-nda moneka dingi.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Tua ku dióndo, pelepalala o kijimbuete kiki, ande dia ku ki tumikisa.
proposal.form.success: Tua ku sakidila, o kibhindamu kiê a ki xikina.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Se u bhinga dingi kikuatekesu ku kibuka kia IATF, tua ku dióndo, soneka o kijimbuete kiala ku luiji.
proposal.form.successRecordLabel: Milongi ia Bibidia Phala o Mbeji ia Kamoxi
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Milongi ia Bibidia Phala o Mbeji ia Kamoxi
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Ua lueza mu ku tumikisa o mukanda. Tua ku dióndo, sota dingi. Se o kibhidi kiki, ki nangenena, mu veji dia kiki, tumikisa njimbu mu mutelembe ua kafuetele.
proposal.field.optional: Ki ku bhingi ku soneka dingi
project.detail.problemTitle: Ibhidi iebhi ia batula o kikalakalu kiki?
project.detail.whyTitle: Mukonda diahi a bhange o kikalakalu kiki
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: O milongi íii ki i zuela ia lungu ni maka enhá.
project.detail.field.maintainer: O muthu ua tokala ku mu langa
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: O Bibidia íii, io lungulule mu Kingileji ki ki bhonzo, mu ku bhita thembu, a-nda i lungulula ué mu madimi engi
footer.label: Kilondekesu kia kijimbuete
footer.howToContribute: Kiebhi ki u tena ku kuatekesa
footer.accessibility: O kuila o athu a tena ku di longa o Bibidia?
footer.blurb: O kikalakalu kiki, ki ki bhonzo ku ki bhanga, ki bhangesa ué o athu ku ki tanga, ni ku ki xikina ku athu a mukuá.
footer.source: Itendelesu phala ku kuatekesa o athu: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)O athu ene mu kalakala ni ji makina jiji, ene mu di longa kiebhi kia tena ku bhanga o ima íii.
contact.label: Kutumikisa kwakwenu
project.status.proposal: O milongi íii, i zuela ia lungu ni:
project.status.stable: Ki iala ni inama mba mutué
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Sota muthu phala ku ku langa
project.status.archived: Milongi ia Bibidia Phala o Mbeji ia Kavua
translation.label: Kikalakalu kia kulungulula
translation.source: O mbandu íii, a i soneka mu dimi dia Kingileji.
translation.humanReviewed: O Bibidia íii, a i lunguluile kiá ku muthu u zuela kiambote o dimi dia Kingileji.
translation.machineAssisted: O Bibidia íii, a i lunguluile kiá ni kikuatekesu kia makina, maji ki bhuala muthu uejiia kiambote o dimi didi.
translation.needsUpdate: O Bibidia íii, a i lungulula kioso kia bhange o Bibidia ia ubhe mu dimi dia Kingileji, kienhiki, nange kua bhingi ku i lungulula dingi.
translation.report: Zuela maka alungu ni ku lungulula: {{contact.i18nEmail}}O kuila kiene muene?
